chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) To qualify for a permit under this subchapter for a vehicle or combination of vehicles, a person must:

(1) pay a permit fee of $900;

(2) designate in the permit application the timber producing counties described by Section 623.321 (Permit) (a) in which the vehicle or combination of vehicles will be operated; and

(3) satisfy the security requirement of Section 623.012 (Security for Permit) .

(b) A permit issued under this subchapter:

(1) is valid for one year; and

(2) must be carried in the vehicle for which it is issued.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.322 — Qualification; Requirements

(a) To qualify for a permit under this subchapter for a vehicle or combination of vehicles, a person must:

    (1) pay a permit fee of $900;

    (2) designate in the permit application the timber producing counties described by Section 623.321 (Permit) (a) in which the vehicle or combination of vehicles will be operated; and

    (3) satisfy the security requirement of Section 623.012 (Security for Permit) .

(b) A permit issued under this subchapter:

    (1) is valid for one year; and

    (2) must be carried in the vehicle for which it is issued.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1184 (S.B.1171), Sec. 4, eff. June 19, 2015.*
